name: Ace Luxury Limousines

name: Excutive Service LLC

fit_notes: Not a fit. 6-employee rural Oregon micro-operator with no confirmed school-bus contracts and no web presence. May be sub-broker for Medicaid NEMT rather than school transport. Below Summit tuck-in threshold.
